mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, email, created_at, last_login_at, failed_login_attempts, locked_until FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, name, email, created_at, last_login_at, failed_login_attempts, locked_until FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, name, email, created_at, last_login_at, failed_login_attempts, locked_until FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, password, name, email, created_at, last_login_at, failed_login_attempts, locked_until FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, failed_login_attempts = #{failedLoginAttempts}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM menus m INNER JOIN user_menus um ON m.id = um.menu_id WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.order_index
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.description, p.menu_id FROM permissions p INNER JOIN user_permissions up ON p.id = up.permission_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.* FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 AND last_activity_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as total_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN s.name = '待办' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as todo_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN s.name = '进行中' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_progress_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN s.name = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_tasks, COALESCE(SUM(th.hours), 0) as total_hours FROM users u LEFT JOIN tasks t ON u.id = t.assignee_id AND (#{startDate} IS NULL OR #{endDate} IS NULL OR (DATE(t.created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate}))) LEFT JOIN statuses s ON t.status_id = s.id LEFT JOIN task_hours th ON u.id = th.user_id AND (#{startDate} IS NULL OR #{endDate} IS NULL OR (DATE(th.created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate}))) WHERE u.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT assignee_id FROM tasks WHERE assignee_id IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.name ORDER BY total_tasks DESC
